name: nav-buttons
description: Thin renderer over Docs/Meta/nav-buttons-registry.json. Each blueprint/mechanism declares nav_buttons[]; installer aggregates. v2.2.0 BREAKING: runTemplaterTemplate action shape changed — single moment-format folder/filename fields replaced with split-field schema (folder_prefix + folder_date_pattern + filename_prefix + filename_date_pattern + filename_suffix). Literal text never reaches moment.format(); bracket-escape gap architecturally impossible.
